title: Croydex Shower Head and Hose Mixer Set with Riser Rail - 1.5m Shower Hose and Handset with Rub Clean Nozzles, Easy Install Wall Mounted Rail for Bathrooms - Ideal Hot & Cold Water Mixer (Chrome)
features: • Complete with riser rail, 1500mm flexitube hose and single function handset with rub clean nozzles
description: From the manufacturer Bath Bar Mixer Shower Set Introducing the Croydex Shower Mixer Bar, a beacon of elegance and functionality. This shower unit, wall-mounted, is a perfect blend of style and practicality, elevating your shower experience to new heights. The Croydex Shower Mixer Taps Wall Mounted unit comes with a 1500 mm Flexitube hose that offers ample length for a comfortable shower. This hose is best suited to round taps, effortlessly merging with your existing bathroom fixtures. The tap shower mixer is easy to install, with no plumbing required, making it a hassle-free addition to your bathroom. The Croydex Shower Mixer Bar is designed with safety and convenience in mind. Do not use with water above 65°C or with excessively high water pressure (max 50psi/3.5 bar) to ensure optimal functionality. The shower head features rub clean nozzles, maintaining hygiene with minimum effort. Transforming your existing taps in a hot and cold water mixer, the Croydex bar mixer shower offers you the luxury of a perfect shower temperature. The hot and cold water tap connector ensures seamless integration with your water supply. A smooth operating lever that allows you to seamlessly switch the water flow between the bath and shower function. The Croydex Shower Bar Mixer set includes: 1 shower head, 1 shower hose, 1 riser rail, 1 mixer & fixing pack. The bar shower fixing kit provides all the necessary for a swift and smooth assembly. This bath & shower system is designed to complement any bathroom decor. Whether you're renovating your bathrooms or looking to make a simple upgrade, the Croydex Shower Mixer Bar adds a touch of sophistication. With Croydex, you're not just getting a product; you're investing in an experience. Elevate your bath and shower systems with the Croydex Shower Bar Mixer today. Best suited for round taps 1500 mm flexitube hose Rub clean nozzles No plumbing required Easy to install Note-use the jubilee clip provided to ensure product is tightened around the tap correctly Bath Shower Mixer Set, White Bath Shower Mixer Set, Silver Bath Shower Mixer Set, Chrome Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.8 out of 5 stars 3,675 3.8 out of 5 stars 3,675 3.8 out of 5 stars 3,675 Price — no data £35.48 £ 35 . 48 £32.32 £ 32 . 32 Handset Height: 216mm x Ø 75mm 216mm x Ø 75mm 216mm x Ø 75mm Shower Hose Length: 1500mm with 7.5mm Bore 1500mm with 7.5mm Bore 1500mm with 7.5mm Bore Riser Rail Height: 473mm 473mm 473mm Diverter Height: 113mm 113mm 113mm Diverter Width: 235mm 235mm 235mm Providing top quality household items is something that we have been doing since 1919. Our heritage is based on creating innovative products that are at home in any household which is something we still hold in high regard today. It's a company that has moved with the times and always listened to what our customers want.
